news.t: Angel Oak Capital Advisors' ETF Platform Reaches 3-Year Milestone, Growing AUM to $2.6B as Its Tailored Suite of Fixed Income Strategies Gain Momentum
Angel Oak Capital Advisors Announces Listing Transfer to Nasdaq for Exchange-Traded Funds
Angel Oak Capital Advisors' ETF Platform Reaches Two-Year Anniversary, Strong Momentum for Diverse Fixed-Income Strategies Continues to Drive Growth
Angel Oak Capital Advisors' ETF Platform Surpasses $1 Billion in AUM
Angel Oak Capital Advisors Completes Conversion of Two Mutual Funds to ETFs

overview.description: The Angel Oak High Yield Opportunities ETF (AOHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides broad exposure to high-yield fixed-income securities, globally. The fund seeks a high level of current income, and to a lesser extent, capital appreciation. AOHY was launched on Feb 16, 2024 and is issued by Angel Oak.

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors' ETF Platform Reaches 3-Year Milestone, Growing AUM to $2.6B as Its Tailored Suite of Fixed Income Strategies Gain Momentum
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $AOHY #ETF--Angel Oak Capital Advisors celebrates growth and success of its ETF suite as it reaches 3-year milestone.

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors Announces Listing Transfer to Nasdaq for Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $AOHY--Angel Oak Capital Advisors announces listing transfer to Nasdaq for its exchange-traded funds.

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors' ETF Platform Reaches Two-Year Anniversary, Strong Momentum for Diverse Fixed-Income Strategies Continues to Drive Growth
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $AOHY #ETF--Angel Oak Capital Advisors celebrates 2-year anniversary of its ETF platform as institutional demand for fixed-income ETFs drive growth.

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors' ETF Platform Surpasses $1 Billion in AUM
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $AOHY #ETF--Angel Oak Capital Advisors reaches $1 billion in assets on its ETF platform driven by distinct focus on structured credit, asset-backed securities.

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors Completes Conversion of Two Mutual Funds to ETFs
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $AOHY #ETF--Angel Oak Capital Advisors completes conversion of two mutual funds to ETFs bringing new actively-managed structured credit funds to investors.
